title: Unvalidated Input – Data Modification
description: The system does not properly validate or sanitize user input before processing or storing it. This could allow attackers to inject malicious code, modify data, or manipulate system behavior.
affected_component: All Input Handling Components (Forms, APIs, Database Interactions)
attack_vector: Injection attacks (SQLi, XSS, Command Injection) via unfiltered user input.  An attacker could modify data in the database or execute arbitrary code on the server.
mitigations: Implement strict input validation and sanitization at all stages.
Use parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Employ Content Security Policy (CSP) to mitigate XSS attacks.
